ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "iss_date" TEXT /* Date the case was issued */,
  "sesso" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the patient */,
  "stato_clinico" TEXT /* Clinical status of the patient */,
  "num_cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases in the category */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the patient */,
  "travel_history" TEXT /* Travel history of the patient */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms of the patient */,
  "comorbidities" TEXT /* Comorbidities of the patient */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the patient */,
  "test_result_date" TEXT /* Date the test result was confirmed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the patient */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the clinical status */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the clinical status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_demographics" (
  "case_demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a case and demographic information */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic entry */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the patient */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_demographics_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_clinical_status" (
  "case_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a case and clinical status */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinical status */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms of the patient */,
  "comorbidities" TEXT /* Comorbidities of the patient */,
  "test_result_date" TEXT /* Date the test result was confirmed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_clinical_status_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES clinical_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare worker, researcher, admin) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or unit the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., initial report, follow-up report) */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Detailed notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reports_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "new_status_id" INTEGER /* New clinical status ID */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_updates_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_updates_new_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_status_id") REFERENCES clinical_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the case */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the case was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Device information (e.g., browser, operating system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_access_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the analytics data */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the analytics data */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for the analytics data */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Clinical status ID for the analytics data */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases for the analytics data */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or area for geographic analysis */,
  "comorbidities" INTEGER /* Number of cases with comorbidities */,
  "vaccination_rate" TEXT /* Vaccination rate for the demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES clinical_status ("status_id")
)
